title: Corning: On The Cusp Of A New Bull Market
text: Corning spiked 16% and closed up 11% on January 26, 2022. The bullish reaction was in response to its Q4 2021 earnings report and stronger than expected guidance for 2022.

title: Corning Incorporated (GLW) Presents at Morgan Stanley 2022 Technology, Media and Telecom Conference (Transcript)
